title: deep-evolve evolve-insights payload v1.0
description: Authoritative payload schema for deep-evolve evolve-insights envelope (artifact_kind=evolve-insights, schema.version=1.0). Mirrors deep-evolve v3.2.0+ emit shape from Phase 2 envelope adoption. Multi-source aggregator over meta-archive — no parent_run_id; provenance.source_artifacts records archive paths.

insights.description: Legacy flat insights array (pre-routing). Newer emits use `insights_for_*` routed buckets.

insight.description: Single insight item. `evidence` always present; producers emit either `pattern`+`suggestion` (Phase 2 deep-evolve canonical) or `title` (legacy/cross-plugin compat).
